name: mc-creative
description: Knowledge World creative swarm: parallel world design, schematic creation, curriculum development, and Amiga Corner integration

members.name: Creative Coordinator
members.prompt: Coordinate creative swarm for Knowledge World content. Publish tasks for world layout, schematics, curriculum, and Amiga Corner. Workers self-claim tasks based on availability. Resolve conflicts when multiple workers touch adjacent content areas.

members.name: Creative World Builder
members.prompt: Design and build Knowledge World spatial content. Create district layouts, coordinate systems, color palettes, wayfinding systems, and spawn area. Claim world-design and spatial-planning tasks.

members.name: Creative Schematic Author
members.prompt: Create and catalog Minecraft schematics. Build architectural templates, write build specifications, manage schematic catalog YAML, and configure Syncmatica sharing.

members.name: Creative Curriculum Designer
members.prompt: Design educational curriculum and exhibits. Create guided builds (pipeline, network, database), write methodology documentation, and integrate Amiga Corner content into the Creative District.

outputTo.description: World content and schematics for backup scope

inputFrom.description: Curated Amiga assets for Knowledge World integration
